message_preview: To set up two-factor authentication (2FA) on Coinbase, you can use methods like security keys, TOTP authenticators (e.g., Google Authenticator), or the Coinbase Security Prompt. For TOTP setup, sign in via desktop browser, go to Security Se

The sources explain that you can buy crypto using a bank account (ACH transfer) or debit card, but they don't specify Coinbase's exact fee structure for crypto purchases. For detailed fee information, check help.coinbase.com.

Your crypto withdrawal might be delayed if it's a vault withdrawal requiring email approvals and a 48-hour waiting period. Check the status in your Coinbase account to see if it's 'Pending Approval' or 'Waiting to Clear'.

To verify your identity on Coinbase, go to the mobile app's Profile & Settings, tap 'Enable send and receive,' and follow the prompts to upload a valid ID document. You’ll also need to verify your phone number through the app.
